_codex_staging.notes: Microsoft transcript source research deposit for FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026. Official Microsoft investor event pages expose written HTML transcript pages for each in-scope fiscal quarter. Structured StockAnalysis rows are included as readable transcript fallbacks for Claude Code review.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.

coverage_summary.primary_structured_source: StockAnalysis transcript pages with official Microsoft context
coverage_summary.official_source_context: Microsoft investor event pages; StockAnalysis structured fallback

quarters.usage_caution: Third-party transcript; requires human awareness before ingestion.
quarters.evidence_note: Readable transcript page used as structured fallback while official direct transcript assets are validated.
